# Failed Payments

If a payment is declined, the order is held in a pending state for twenty-four hours so the shopper can update the card without losing the cart. After twenty-four hours the pending order is cancelled automatically and any authorisation hold is released. The three most common decline reasons are an incorrect security code, an expired card, and an address that does not match the bank's records.

[Source: payment_methods.md#failed-payments]
